description_long: This bungalow features a compact, single-story layout with a modern open-plan design. The interior includes a living area with a sofa and TV, a dining space with a table and chairs, and two bedrooms—one with a double bed and the other with a bunk bed. The walls are adorned with patterned wallpaper, and the floors are finished with a mix of wood and tile textures. A small balcony with a black metal railing extends from the living area, providing outdoor space. The structure is defined by clean lines, minimal ornamentation, and a flat roof, typical of contemporary urban residential architecture.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with patterned walls, wood and tile floors, and a balcony with a black metal railing.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the open living area, dining space, and balcony with black railing, as well as the two bedrooms separated by interior walls.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the dining area and the main bedroom with a double bed, as well as the patterned wallpaper and balcony access.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a rear perspective, showing the back walls, the headboard of the main bed, and the TV in the living area.
description_view_3: View 3 displays the exterior side wall with patterned wallpaper, the main entrance door, and the balcony from a side angle.
